name: ISO 27002:2022
description: ISO/IEC 27002:2022 is an international practice guide for information security controls, providing implementation guidance for the controls defined in ISO/IEC 27001. The 2022 version reorganizes the controls into four thematic categories (organizational, people, physical, and technological), contains 93 controls, and introduces 11 new controls.

categories.name: Organizational controls
categories.description: Governance, operational, supplier and compliance-related controls.

requirements.name: Policies for information security
requirements.description: Implement control 5.1 (Policies for information security) in line with ISO/IEC 27002:2022 guidance and align with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A applicability.
requirements.verification: Verify documented policy/procedure, implementation evidence, and periodic review records for this control.
